hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】特朗普表示他“喜欢通货膨胀”，因为美国物价以三年来最快的速度上涨；【FINANCE】比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起；【WORLD】美军对伊朗发动新的打击后，德黑兰以美国海湾基地为目标。

items.title: Trump says he 'loves the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
items.summary: Consumers are increasingly feeling the strain of the US-Israel war in Iran.
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他“喜欢通货膨胀”，因为美国物价以三年来最快的速度上涨
items.summary_zh: 消费者越来越感受到美以战争在伊朗带来的压力。

items.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
items.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.
items.title_zh: 比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币跌至 2024 年以来的最低价格，投资者纷纷涌向与超流动性平台相关的新型加密货币投资——HYPE ETF。

items.title: Tehran targets US Gulf bases after American forces launch new strikes on Iran
items.summary: US Central Command said its latest airstrikes were responding to "unwarranted and continued aggression" from Iran.
items.title_zh: 美军对伊朗发动新的打击后，德黑兰以美国海湾基地为目标
items.summary_zh: 美国中央司令部表示，其最新的空袭是为了回应伊朗“无端且持续的侵略”。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade Strikes for a Second Day
items.summary: The exchanges raise the specter of a return to all-out war in the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗连续第二天进行贸易打击
items.summary_zh: 这些交流引发了中东重新爆发全面战争的担忧。

items.title: BlackRock and Fidelity are quietly turning bitcoin ETFs into a two-firm market
items.summary: BlackRock's IBIT and Fidelity's FBTC are attracting the vast majority of new bitcoin ETF money, leaving smaller funds increasingly sidelined as institutional investors consolidate around the industry's largest players.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德和富达正在悄然将比特币 ETF 转变为两家公司的市场
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的 IBIT 和富达 (Fidelity) 的 FBTC 吸引了绝大多数新的比特币 ETF 资金，随着机构投资者围绕行业最大的参与者进行整合，小型基金日益被边缘化。

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: Who answers the 3am call when DeFi breaks?
items.summary: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Ben Nadareski writes that to win over big investors, DeFi builders must act like accountable money managers, not just software developers. Then, Stephen Stonberg says that bitcoin holders can survive crashes and protect their assets by earning
items.title_zh: 加密货币多空：当 DeFi 崩溃时，谁接听凌晨 3 点的电话？
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《加密多空》中，Ben Nadareski 写道，为了赢得大投资者的青睐，DeFi 建设者必须像负责任的资金管理者一样行事，而不仅仅是软件开发商。然后，斯蒂芬·斯顿伯格表示，比特币持有者可以在崩溃中幸存下来，并通过赚取收益来保护自己的资产

items.title: The quantum clock is ticking: it's Bitcoin's problem, not Ethereum's
items.summary: A recent research note published by Citi analysts reached a conclusion about quantum risk that should give every institutional bitcoin holder pause, Tabar explains.
items.title_zh: 量子时钟正在滴答作响：这是比特币的问题，而不是以太坊的问题
items.summary_zh: 塔巴尔解释说，花旗分析师最近发表的一份研究报告得出了一个关于量子风险的结论，这应该让每个机构比特币持有者暂停一下。

items.title: Michael Saylor gets into public debate over claims that Strategy's latest share sale was dilutive
items.summary: Strategy's BTC Yield fell from 13.0% to 12.8% following its latest bitcoin purchase, prompting a debate on X over whether the purchase was dilutive to shareholders.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·塞勒 (Michael Saylor) 因有关 Strategy 最新股票出售具有稀释性的说法而引发公开辩论
items.summary_zh: Strategy 最新购买比特币后，其 BTC 收益率从 13.0% 下降至 12.8%，引发了关于 X 购买是否会稀释股东权益的争论。

items.title: Citigroup shares outperform down market after Trump endorsement
items.summary: Jane Fraser-led Citi fell 1%, less than the rest of the market and some other major banks, after Trump lauded its turnaround in a social media post.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持后，花旗集团股价跑赢下跌市场
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普在社交媒体帖子中赞扬花旗集团的转变后，简·弗雷泽领导的花旗集团股价下跌 1%，跌幅低于市场其他股票和其他一些主要银行。

items.title: Regulators' proposed prediction markets rules ban trading on terrorism, assassinations
items.summary: The proposed rules from the commission will now face a public comment period.
items.title_zh: 监管机构提议的预测市场规则禁止恐怖主义、暗杀交易
items.summary_zh: 该委员会拟议的规则现在将面临公众意见征询期。

items.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
items.summary: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.
items.title_zh: 报道称，以色列对黎巴嫩南部的袭击造成 17 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道，其中九人在泰尔德巴镇发生的一系列袭击中丧生。

items.title: French singer Patrick Bruel faces rape charges
items.summary: Bruel has been placed under judicial investigation, which means an examining magistrate will look more deeply into the case.
items.title_zh: 法国歌手帕特里克·布鲁埃尔面临强奸指控
items.summary_zh: 布鲁尔已接受司法调查，这意味着预审法官将更深入地调查此案。

items.title: How Quiet Oman Landed Itself in Trump’s Cross Hairs
items.summary: As the Iran war drags on, Oman — a U.S. ally and mediator with Iran — has found itself at odds with the Trump administration and some of its own neighbors.
items.title_zh: 安静的阿曼如何陷入特朗普的十字准线
items.summary_zh: 随着伊朗战争的拖延，阿曼——美国的盟友和伊朗的调解者——发现自己与特朗普政府和一些邻国存在分歧。

items.title: Coinbase-backed Stand With Crypto calls on members to campaign against banks blocking digital asset transactions
items.summary: Stand With Crypto UK is telling its members to file formal complaints with high-street banks over sector-wide transfer bans.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 支持的 Stand With Crypto 呼吁会员反对银行阻止数字资产交易
items.summary_zh: Stand With Crypto UK 要求其成员就全行业转账禁令向商业银行提出正式投诉。

items.title: Netomi CEO says $5 trillion AI customer experience market could boost stablecoin demand
items.summary: Puneet Mehta, a former high-level Wall Street engineer and data scientist, said the rapid expansion of AI enterprise software will increase demand for stablecoins and blockchain.
items.title_zh: Netomi首席执行官表示，5万亿美元的人工智能客户体验市场可能会提振稳定币需求
items.summary_zh: 前华尔街高级工程师和数据科学家 Puneet Mehta 表示，人工智能企业软件的快速扩张将增加对稳定币和区块链的需求。

items.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX IPO could become bitcoin’s latest headwind
items.summary: SpaceX setting aside up to 30% of IPO shares for retail investors could prompt investors to exit crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 首次公开募股可能成为比特币的最新阻力
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 将高达 30% 的 IPO 股份留给散户投资者，可能会促使投资者退出比特币和以太坊等加密资产。

items.title: Solana infrastructure firm Helius acquires Light Protocol to expand onchain privacy
items.summary: The acquisition comes amid a moment of consolidation in the crypto industry and during a resurgent interest in onchain privacy.
items.title_zh: Solana 基础设施公司 Helius 收购 Light Protocol 以扩展链上隐私
items.summary_zh: 此次收购正值加密货币行业的整合时期以及人们对链上隐私的兴趣重新兴起之际。

items.title: UK crypto advocates push back on exchange transfer restrictions, say banks are ‘choking off’ adoption
items.summary: Industry groups say roughly 40% of UK crypto transactions are blocked or restricted by banks, as they push to ease restrictions.
items.title_zh: 英国加密货币倡导者反对兑换转账限制，称银行正在“阻止”采用
items.summary_zh: 行业组织表示，在银行推动放宽限制的过程中，大约 40% 的英国加密货币交易被银行阻止或限制。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Velvet (VELVET)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #122.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：天鹅绒（VELVET）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 122。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #42.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Audiera (BEAT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 42 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Humanity (H)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #134.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：人性 (H)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 134 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #11.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 11。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 经济研究交流中心简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发起经济研究交流，以研究人工智能对就业、生产力和经济的影响。选定的研究项目现已开放申请。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
items.summary: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的“perps”交易量在推出一周内就突破了 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司发言人表示，该产品是预测市场平台历史上增长最快的产品。

items.title: Whale graveyard dating back five million years discovered
items.summary: The Indian Ocean site is "far beyond anything we had imagined", one researcher says.
items.title_zh: 发现距今五百万年的鲸鱼墓地
items.summary_zh: 一位研究人员表示，印度洋遗址“远远超出了我们的想象”。

items.title: A Twist in Ukraine’s Drone Campaign Is ‘Really Hurting the Russians’
items.summary: Midrange attacks, using upgraded drones that Ukraine produces in huge numbers, are causing fuel shortages and complicating troop rotations.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机行动的转变“确实伤害了俄罗斯人”
items.summary_zh: 使用乌克兰大量生产的升级版无人机进行的中程攻击正在导致燃料短缺，并使部队轮换变得更加复杂。

items.title: Privacy returns to focus as Ethereum developers explore new token standards
items.summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at where privacy is headed in the Ethereum ecosystem.
items.title_zh: 随着以太坊开发者探索新的代币标准，隐私重新成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《协议通讯》中，我们将探讨以太坊生态系统中隐私的发展方向。

items.title: Bitcoin takes back seat to stablecoins and tokenization among financial advisors: Bitwise CIO
items.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan said financial advisors are now showing more interest in stablecoins and tokenization than bitcoin.
items.title_zh: 在财务顾问中，比特币让位于稳定币和代币化：Bitwise CIO
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 首席信息官 Matt Hougan 表示，财务顾问现在对稳定币和代币化表现出比比特币更大的兴趣。

items.title: CryptoQuant sees bitcoin bottom near $53,600 while demand remains ‘deeply unfavorable’
items.summary: CryptoQuant sees bitcoin bottom near $53,600, its current realized price and a level that has historically marked bear market bottoms.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 认为比特币触底接近 53,600 美元，而需求仍然“非常不利”
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 认为比特币底部接近 53,600 美元，这是其当前实现的价格，也是历史上标志着熊市底部的水平。

items.title: Ethereum could become a fully zero-knowledge proof-based protocol in 3 to 5 years, Joe Lubin says
items.summary: Ethereum needs infinite capacity to meet the infinite demands of being a World Computer, making L2s necessary, Joe Lubin said.
items.title_zh: Joe Lubin 表示，以太坊可能会在 3 到 5 年内成为一个完全基于零知识证明的协议
items.summary_zh: Joe Lubin 表示，以太坊需要无限的容量来满足成为世界计算机的无限需求，这使得 L2 成为必要。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: Introducing North Mini Code: Cohere’s First Model For Developers
items.title_zh: North Mini Code 简介：Cohere 为开发人员提供的第一个模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: North Carolina treasurer passes on SpaceX citing valuation concerns; favors OpenAI, Anthropic
items.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.
items.title_zh: 北卡罗来纳州财长以估值担忧为由放弃了 SpaceX；支持 OpenAI、Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 北卡罗来纳州对人工智能初创公司 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 进行了大量投资，同时避免直接持有 SpaceX 的股份。

items.title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
items.summary: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.
items.title_zh: 网络安全公司称，北京正在升级人工智能间谍活动，以在科技领域赶上美国
items.summary_zh: 美国网络安全巨头 CrowdStrike 表示，超过一半的国家资助的针对科技公司的人工智能资产网络攻击是由中国实体发起的。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通计划今年部署更强大的人工智能代理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，长期运行的人工智能代理即将消除阻碍大公司内部采用的安全和治理障碍。

items.title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
items.summary: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.
items.title_zh: 电动汽车巨头比亚迪预测中国汽车销量的80%很快将是电动汽车
items.summary_zh: 比亚迪预计，尽管制造商和分析师预计国内需求将进一步减少，但中国竞争激烈的电动汽车市场将继续增长。

items.title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
items.summary: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.
items.title_zh: 这家初创公司希望减少预测市场的支付摩擦
items.summary_zh: EDGE Markets 向 CNBC 独家透露，该公司宣布推出两款新产品，以解决预测市场的支付问题。

items.title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
items.summary: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.
items.title_zh: 香港IPO热潮正引发绩效问题
items.summary_zh: 随着香港与华尔街争夺最大的IPO市场，越来越多的上市前股价在上市后表现不佳。

items.title: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
items.summary: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.
items.title_zh: 印度航空171号航班坠毁原因引发激烈争论
items.summary_zh: 调查的最终结论尚未公布，但未来几天可能会公布更多结论。

items.title: Three Indian sailors missing after US says it hit tanker in Gulf of Oman
items.summary: India's government said three Indian sailors were missing and 21 crew had been rescued after the hit on the Settebello off the coast of Oman.
items.title_zh: 美国称在阿曼湾击中油轮后三名印度水手失踪
items.summary_zh: 印度政府表示，阿曼海岸附近的塞特贝洛号遭遇袭击，造成 3 名印度水手失踪，21 名船员获救。

items.title: An Everest guide's miraculous survival raises questions for tourism industry
items.summary: Why was a cook leading clients up the world's highest peak? And why was he left to rescue himself?
items.title_zh: 一名珠穆朗玛峰向导的奇迹生还给旅游业带来了疑问
items.summary_zh: 为什么厨师要带领顾客登上世界最高峰？为什么留下他来拯救自己？

items.title: Fireworks illuminate Barcelona's Sagrada Família during Pope visit
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV says Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Família is a masterpiece of "stones, colours and light" during his visit to Spain.
items.title_zh: 教宗访问期间烟花照亮巴塞罗那圣家堂
items.summary_zh: 教皇利奥十四世在访问西班牙期间表示，巴塞罗那标志性的圣家堂是“石头、色彩和光线”的杰作。

items.title: Bill Gates says Epstein wanted personal relationship, but he 'never reciprocated'
items.summary: The Microsoft co-founder spent hours talking to lawmakers behind closed doors, where he also said Epstein used his marital infidelities to pressure him.
items.title_zh: 比尔·盖茨称爱泼斯坦想要建立私人关系，但他“从未给予回应”
items.summary_zh: 这位微软联合创始人花了几个小时与立法者闭门交谈，他还表示爱泼斯坦利用他的婚姻不忠向他施加压力。

items.title: U.S. Ebola Unit Sparks Fury, Protests and a Political Crisis in Kenya
items.summary: Hundreds of Kenyans have marched through the streets to oppose a quarantine facility that would be reserved exclusively for American patients.
items.title_zh: 美国埃博拉小组在肯尼亚引发愤怒、抗议和政治危机
items.summary_zh: 数百名肯尼亚人走上街头游行，反对专门为美国患者保留的隔离设施。

items.title: Night of Violence Grips Belfast After Stabbing Attack
items.summary: Cars and a bus were set on fire and families were driven from their homes after a stabbing in Belfast caused tensions to spill onto the streets.
items.title_zh: 刺伤袭击后贝尔法斯特陷入暴力之夜
items.summary_zh: 贝尔法斯特发生刺伤事件，紧张局势蔓延到街道上，汽车和公共汽车被纵火焚烧，许多家庭被赶出家门。

items.title: On the Eve of the World Cup, U.S. Immigration Policy Turns Some Away
items.summary: Some fans and participants hoping to enter the United States for the World Cup have complained that restrictive immigration rules have presented a roadblock.
items.title_zh: 世界杯前夕，美国移民政策拒绝一些人
items.summary_zh: 一些希望进入美国观看世界杯的球迷和参赛者抱怨说，限制性的移民规定设置了障碍。

items.title: Trump Says He’s ‘Not Looking to Renew’ Canada-Mexico Trade Deal
items.summary: The president’s comments come at a crucial moment in talks among the three countries over the renewal of their free-trade agreement.
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他“不打算续签”加拿大-墨西哥贸易协议
items.summary_zh: 总统发表此番言论之际，这三个国家正在就续签自由贸易协定进行谈判。

items.title: Indonesian Military Court Sentences Four in Acid Attack on Rights Advocate
items.summary: The victim is an outspoken critic of Indonesia’s powerful military, and military prosecutors took over the case despite his objections.
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚军事法庭对四名人权倡导者进行泼酸袭击作出判决
items.summary_zh: 受害者是印尼强大军队的直言不讳的批评者，军事检察官不顾他的反对接手了此案。

items.title: Somali World Cup Referee Denied Entry to U.S. Returns Home to Hero’s Welcome
items.summary: Omar Abdulkadir Artan, who is widely admired in his home country, would have been the first Somali to referee a World Cup game.
items.title_zh: 索马里世界杯裁判被拒绝入境美国 回国受到英雄欢迎
items.summary_zh: 奥马尔·阿卜杜勒卡迪尔·阿尔坦在祖国广受尊敬，他可能是第一位担任世界杯比赛裁判的索马里人。

items.title: Hong Kong Charges 7 People and 2 Companies Over Deadly Apartment Fire
items.summary: The 25 charges include manslaughter and conspiracy. They are the first to emerge from a monthslong investigation into a blaze that killed 168 people.
items.title_zh: 香港因公寓火灾致7人和2家公司被起诉
items.summary_zh: 这 25 项指控包括过失杀人和共谋罪。他们是对导致 168 人死亡的火灾进行长达数月调查的第一人。

items.title: Mastercard prepares for a future where AI agents make payments
items.summary: The company is working with Coinbase, Stripe and other companies to build trusted payment systems for AI-driven commerce.
items.title_zh: 万事达卡为人工智能代理付款的未来做好准备
items.summary_zh: 该公司正在与 Coinbase、Stripe 和其他公司合作，为人工智能驱动的商业构建可信的支付系统。

items.title: Kalshi now requires users to reveal employers as it fights insider trading and market manipulation
items.summary: The prediction markets platform introduced new measures on Tuesday that it said will apply to markets it considers are likely to face higher risks of insider trading and abuse.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 现在要求用户透露雇主，以打击内幕交易和市场操纵
items.summary_zh: 该预测市场平台周二推出了新措施，表示将适用于它认为可能面临更高内幕交易和滥用风险的市场。

items.title: Prediction markets get first U.S. rule proposal as CFTC pursues contract reviews
items.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission opened a proposed rule for public comment that sets an approach to determine contracts in the "public interest."
items.title_zh: 随着 CFTC 寻求合同审查，预测市场收到第一份美国规则提案
items.summary_zh: 商品期货交易委员会公开了一项拟议规则以征求公众意见，该规则制定了一种确定符合“公共利益”的合同的方法。

items.title: Raydium DEX says $1.34 million exploit hit retired AMM program, treasury to cover losses
items.summary: The exploit drained roughly $1.34 million from five inactive Raydium liquidity pools, and impacted users will be compensated.
items.title_zh: Raydium DEX 称已退役的 AMM 计划遭受 134 万美元的攻击，财政部将弥补损失
items.summary_zh: 该漏洞从五个不活跃的 Raydium 流动性池中消耗了约 134 万美元，受影响的用户将获得补偿。

items.title: Tether leads up to $1.4 billion round in robotics firm Neura, plans crypto wallet integration
items.summary: Tether will also provide and "deploy" technology within the Neura robotics ecosystem, including a crypto wallet integration.
items.title_zh: Tether 领投机器人公司 Neura 融资 14 亿美元，计划整合加密钱包
items.summary_zh: Tether 还将在 Neura 机器人生态系统中提供和“部署”技术，包括加密钱包集成。

items.title: Mastercard unveils Agent Pay for Machines to support autonomous AI transactions, including stablecoins
items.summary: Mastercard's Agent Pay for Machines infrastructure will support high-volume, low-value payments by autonomous AI agents.

items.summary_zh: 万事达卡的机器代理支付基础设施将支持自主人工智能代理的大批量、小额支付。

items.title: MegaETH-based MNX raises $6.4 million pre-seed at $40 million valuation to build AI-focused futures exchange
items.summary: MNX, a decentralized futures exchange focused on the AI economy, has raised $6.4 million in a pre-seed funding round.
items.title_zh: 总部位于 MegaETH 的 MNX 以 4000 万美元的估值筹集了 640 万美元的种子前资金，以建立专注于人工智能的期货交易所
items.summary_zh: MNX 是一家专注于人工智能经济的去中心化期货交易所，在种子轮前融资中筹集了 640 万美元。

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.title_zh: 天体物理学家如何使用 Codex 帮助模拟黑洞
items.summary_zh: 了解天体物理学家 Chi-kwan Chan 如何使用 Codex 构建黑洞模拟，帮助科学家研究极端物理学并测试爱因斯坦的广义相对论。

items.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US

items.summary: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.

items.summary: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.

items.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.

items.summary_zh: OpenAI 确认已向 SEC 提交机密 S-1，但尚未确定采取进一步行动的时间。
